title: No Auto Pause
description: Disables all automatic pausing behavior in Minecraft.
body:
No Auto Pause

Prevents Minecraft from pausing when you alt-tab or lose window focus.

🚀 Getting Started

### Installation 1. Install **Fabric Loader** 2. Install **Fabric API** 3. Drop the mod into your `mods` folder 4. Launch Minecraft No setup required. The mod is active immediately after installation.

📋 Feature List

  • Disables pause on alt-tab
  • Disables pause on window focus loss
  • Disables background auto-pause behavior
  • No config, no toggle, no keybinds
  • Always enabled while installed

    • ℹ️ Notes

    - Client-side only - Safe to use in multiplayer - Does not interfere with menus or normal gameplay - Designed to be minimal and bug-free

    🌍 Available On
